name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Trump is not our doctor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Well, that didn't take long. Just one day after Americans overwhelmingly voted to reject the extreme Trump agenda, the White House issued new rules **making it even harder for women to access contraception without their boss 's permission.** Clearly, Trump doesn't believe women have the right to make their own health care decisions. And with Brett Kavanaugh now on the Supreme Court, **women 's health, including _Roe v. Wade_ , are more imperiled than ever.** [**We need to act. Add your name and make sure people know what 's happening. Women absolutely should not have to get their boss's permission to access contraceptive care.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cff/622b7b5b/1e1f9a89/307b7f83/769320606/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181119m") Trump's crusade is nothing new, of course. The president announced during his campaign that women who undergo abortions should be "punished," and has spent his time in office doing everything he can to chip away at women's access to health care. He even proposed that _any federally-funded health clinic be banned from discussing abortion._ Our new Democratic majority in the House will fight Trump's agenda at every turn. But we need your help to make sure people are engaged. [**Add your name >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cff/622b7b5b/1e1f9a89/307b7f83/769320606/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181119m") Thank you for all you do, Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cff/622b7b5b/1e1f9a89/307b7f82/769320606/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: A Real Chance at Criminal Justice Reform
body:
At a White House event last week, President Trump put his full support behind the First Step Act. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66ed7090d4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **A Real Chance at Criminal Justice Reform**

At a White House event last week, President Donald J. Trump put his full support behind the First Step Act, praising members of “both parties for ‘pouring their hearts’ into the compromise,” _The_ _New York Times_ editorial board writes.

President Trump “wants to make progress on critical issues that enjoy broad support. Lawmakers from both parties should follow suit.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=192888f3ce&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abaea33b54&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner and Council of Economic Advisers Member Tomas Philipson write that “the bipartisan reforms supported by the president are an important broad-based approach that will, hopefully, benefit not only prisoners, but also the American public . . . Through our efforts to break the cycle of crime and reduce recidivism, we can assist more people to contribute to our society rather than be a burden to our great country.”
---
|
---
| _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da2b7f952d&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board says that Congress should seize this opportunity for meaningful criminal justice reform. “The broader goal is to reduce recidivism, and the model is Texas, which implemented some of the same reforms like assessing how risky a prisoner is to society. Both violent crime and incarceration rates are falling in the Lone Star State, and Indiana, Kentucky and Mississippi are trying similar reforms.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump toured the devastation caused by the deadliest and most destructive wildfire in California’s history and said he would press for better forest management to prevent future infernos,” Vivian Salama reports for _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=00097ce9d5&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Speaking to reporters alongside the ashes of a neighborhood in Paradise, Calif., Mr. Trump hailed the efforts of law-enforcement officials and first responders who continue to work to contain the blaze and help victims.”
---
|
---
| “California Gov. Jerry Brown (D) said Sunday that President Trump . . . told him that he has California's back as it deals with deadly wildfires,” Megan Keller writes in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e66408bf87&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The president not only has signed a presidential declaration giving California substantial funding, but he said and pledged very specifically to — to continue to help us,” Governor Brown said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=93813ff090&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e7debf0bb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=97d1a58c71)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Vote NOW on President Trump’s National Thanksgiving Turkey pardon!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# Vote NOW on President Trump’s National Thanksgiving Turkey pardon!

Tomorrow, President Donald J. Trump will continue the White House tradition of pardoning the National Thanksgiving Turkey at a ceremony in the Rose Garden.

And you get to decide which bird he pardons.

Our two feathered candidates—Peas and Carrots—arrived in Washington, D.C., over the weekend. Cast your vote before polls close at 11 a.m. ET tomorrow, November 20.

---
| [Vote Now](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5da867edb1&e=3ee4985eea "Vote Now")
---
| [Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4d24f825b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d97e8c871f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7ed452b70e)
---
| | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Chairwoman Terrie Rizzo
subject: Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Team,

I want to take a moment to thank you.

Because of you, we pulled off a historic victory for Nikki Fried, flipped two congressional districts and a state Senate seat, and won seven state House seats. And by turning out a record number of Democrats, we were able to flip dozens of county and municipal races across the state.

In addition, we celebrate Second Chances and the major victory in restoring voting rights for more than one million non-violent offenders who have served their time.

For the countless volunteers, donors, and supporters that make our work possible: **We 're so grateful that you stand with us.**

While we had a great many wins -- and we need to celebrate those -- we acknowledge that Andrew Gillum and Bill Nelson's losses are heartbreaking. But thanks to their campaigns, we've seen people and communities make their voices heard, in some cases for the first time. That's powerful, and that's the energy and attitude we must continue to foster.

We won't quit. We'll roll up our sleeves and continue our work to make a better Florida for all of us.

We hope you have a safe and happy Thanksgiving with friends, family, and loved ones.

Together,

Chairwoman Terrie Rizzo
Florida Democratic Party
---
| |
---
We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters.

[Click here if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba22/1a5213b3/6aa9dac8/7195f2cf/1601434573/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI2YWE5ZGFjOCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiYTIyIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/6aa9dac8/77b4ba22?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+if+youd+like+to+unsubscribe+f&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181119_1_1&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181119_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181119_1_1")
Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats! Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee _Copyright Florida Democratic Party, All rights reserved._

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: John Barrow [Dec. 4 runoff election]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
John Barrow is in the middle of a very tight runoff election for Secretary of State. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa616/34a064cc/5f33aed/70c01e5/3291598777/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend: The governor's race is over, but we still have a chance to make a difference and protect voting rights in Georgia: My friend John Barrow is in the middle of a very tight runoff election for Secretary of State. He is running on a bold platform of protecting Georgians' sacred right to vote. After seeing such rampant voter suppression on Election Day, and witnessing how Brian Kemp used his office as Secretary of State to make it harder for some Georgians to vote, all of us should be working as hard as we can to help John win his runoff election on December 4th. We know what's at stake. Electing John Barrow as our next Secretary of State is how we ensure that in the next election, and the one after that, every eligible Georgian can cast their ballot without waiting in line for hours, or having to request an absentee ballot multiple times only to have it arrive late. It's how we ensure that every vote is counted. That's why I'm asking you: **[Will you chip in to John Barrow's runoff campaign for Secretary of State today? This is important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa616/34a064cc/5f33aed/70c01e2/3291598777/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTE5MjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-barrow?refcode=IE11192018-full")** Here's the truth: Democracy only works when we work for it. And John Barrow will work hard to make sure that no Georgian has their voice shouted down by agents of voter suppression. He's the only qualified choice for the job, and I know he can win in just two short weeks. Thank you for standing with us in the fight to protect voting rights in Georgia. Yours, Stacey Abrams
---

**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa616/34a064cc/5f33aed/70c01e2/3291598777/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTE5MjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-barrow?refcode=IE11192018-full")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa616/34a064cc/5f33aed/70c01e3/3291598777/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa616/34a064cc/5f33aed/70c01e0/3291598777/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa616/34a064cc/5f33aed/70c01e1/3291598777/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")
